# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_configuration:
        description: 'Build configuration (Release/Debug)'
        required: true
        default: 'Release'
        type: choice
        options:
          - Release
          - Debug
      retention_days:
        description: 'Artifact retention days'
        required: false
        default: '30'
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

env:
  BUILD_CONFIG: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_configuration || 'Release' }}
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION: ${{ github.event.inputs.retention_days || '30' }}
  BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR: build/output
  DEPLOY_SCRIPTS_DIR: deploy
  CONFIG_DIR: config

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    outputs:
      build_version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build_sha: ${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
      build_timestamp: ${{ steps.version.outputs.timestamp }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate build version
        id: version
        run: |
          SHORT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
          TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
          if [[ "${GITHUB_REF}" == refs/tags/* ]]; then
            VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}"
          elif [[ "${GITHUB_REF}" == refs/heads/release/* ]]; then
            BRANCH_VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/heads/release/}"
            VERSION="${BRANCH_VERSION}-rc.${SHORT_SHA}"
          else
            VERSION="0.0.0-dev.${SHORT_SHA}"
          fi
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "short_sha=${SHORT_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "timestamp=${TIMESTAMP}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build version: ${VERSION}"

      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm rebuild

      - name: Run security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build application
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
        run: |
          npm run build
          echo "Build completed successfully"

      - name: Prepare build artifacts directory
        run: |
          mkdir -p staging/binaries
          mkdir -p staging/config
          mkdir -p staging/deploy
          mkdir -p staging/checksums

      - name: Collect compiled binaries
        run: |
          if [ -d "${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}" ]; then
            cp -r ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/* staging/binaries/
          elif [ -d "dist" ]; then
            cp -r dist/* staging/binaries/
          else
            echo "::error::No build output directory found"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Collected binaries:"
          find staging/binaries -type f | head -50

      - name: Collect configuration files
        run: |
          if [ -d "${CONFIG_DIR}" ]; then
            find ${CONFIG_DIR} -type f \( -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.toml" -o -name "*.conf" -o -name "*.ini" \) | while read -r file; do
              cp --parents "$file" staging/config/ 2>/dev/null || cp "$file" staging/config/
            done
          fi
          for config_file in .env.example .env.template docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yaml Dockerfile nginx.conf; do
            if [ -f "$config_file" ]; then
              cp "$config_file" staging/config/
            fi
          done
          if [ -f ".env" ]; then
            echo "::warning::Skipping .env file to prevent secret leakage"
          fi
          echo "Collected configuration files:"
          find staging/config -type f 2>/dev/null || echo "No config files found"

      - name: Collect deployment scripts
        run: |
          if [ -d "${DEPLOY_SCRIPTS_DIR}" ]; then
            find ${DEPLOY_SCRIPTS_DIR} -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ps1" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "Makefile" \) | while read -r file; do
              cp --parents "$file" staging/deploy/ 2>/dev/null || cp "$file" staging/deploy/
            done
          fi
          for script_dir in scripts ci cd infrastructure; do
            if [ -d "$script_dir" ]; then
              cp -r "$script_dir" staging/deploy/
            fi
          done
          if [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
            cp Makefile staging/deploy/
          fi
          echo "Collected deployment scripts:"
          find staging/deploy -type f 2>/dev/null || echo "No deploy scripts found"

      - name: Scan artifacts for secrets
        run: |
          echo "Scanning artifacts for potential secrets..."
          PATTERNS=(
            'password\s*[:=]'
            'secret\s*[:=]'
            'api[_-]?key\s*[:=]'
            'token\s*[:=]'
            'private[_-]?key'
            'BEGIN\s+(RSA|DSA|EC|OPENSSH)\s+PRIVATE\s+KEY'
            'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY'
            'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}'
          )
          FOUND_SECRETS=false
          for pattern in "${PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if grep -rliE "$pattern" staging/ 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "::warning::Potential secret pattern found: $pattern"
              FOUND_SECRETS=true
            fi
          done
          if [ "$FOUND_SECRETS" = true ]; then
            echo "::error::Potential secrets detected in artifacts. Please review before distribution."
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "No secrets detected in artifacts."

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > staging/BUILD_MANIFEST.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "short_sha": "${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "build_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "timestamp": "${{ steps.version.outputs.timestamp }}",
            "configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "triggered_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "repository": "${{ github.repository }}",
            "workflow": "${{ github.workflow }}",
            "runner_os": "${{ runner.os }}",
            "runner_arch": "${{ runner.arch }}"
          }
          EOF
          echo "Build manifest created"
          cat staging/BUILD_MANIFEST.json

      - name: Generate checksums
        run: |
          cd staging
          find binaries config deploy -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | while read -r file; do
            sha256sum "$file" >> checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt
          done
          sha256sum BUILD_MANIFEST.json >> checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt
          echo "Generated checksums:"
          cat checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt

      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: staging/binaries/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: config-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: staging/config/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: warn
          compression-level: 6

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-scripts-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: staging/deploy/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: warn
          compression-level: 6

      - name: Upload build manifest and checksums
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-metadata-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: |
            staging/BUILD_MANIFEST.json
            staging/checksums/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload complete distribution package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: full-distribution-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: staging/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

  verify:
    name: Verify Artifacts
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - name: Download complete distribution
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: full-distribution-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}
          path: verify/

      - name: Verify checksums
        run: |
          cd verify
          echo "Verifying artifact integrity..."
          if [ -f checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt ]; then
            sha256sum -c checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt
            echo "All checksums verified successfully"
          else
            echo "::error::Checksum file not found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Verify build manifest
        run: |
          cd verify
          if [ -f BUILD_MANIFEST.json ]; then
            echo "Build manifest contents:"
            cat BUILD_MANIFEST.json
            MANIFEST_VERSION=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('BUILD_MANIFEST.json'))['version'])")
            if [ "$MANIFEST_VERSION" != "${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}" ]; then
              echo "::error::Version mismatch in manifest"
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "Build manifest verified"
          else
            echo "::error::Build manifest not found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: List all artifacts
        run: |
          echo "=== Distribution Package Contents ==="
          find verify -type f | sort
          echo ""
          echo "=== File Sizes ==="
          du -sh verify/*/  2>/dev/null || true
          du -sh verify/ 2>/dev/null || true

  notify:
    name: Notify Team
    needs:
      - build
      - verify
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    timeout-minutes: 5

    steps:
      - name: Generate download summary
        run: |
          REPO="${{ github.repository }}"
          RUN_ID="${{ github.run_id }}"
          VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          ARTIFACTS_URL="https://github.com/${REPO}/actions/runs/${RUN_ID}"

          cat >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" << EOF
          # 📦 Build Distribution Summary

          ## Build Information
          | Property | Value |
          |----------|-------|
          | **Version** | \`${VERSION}\` |
          | **Commit** | \`${SHA}\` |
          | **Branch** | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |
          | **Configuration** | \`${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}\` |
          | **Build Number** | \`${{ github.run_number }}\` |
          | **Triggered By** | \`${{ github.actor }}\` |
          | **Timestamp** | \`${{ needs.build.outputs.build_timestamp }}\` |

          ## Available Artifacts

          Download artifacts from the [Actions Run Page](${ARTIFACTS_URL}):

          | Artifact | Description |
          |----------|-------------|
          | 📁 **full-distribution-${VERSION}-${SHA}** | Complete distribution package with all files |
          | ⚙️ **binaries-${VERSION}-${SHA}** | Compiled application binaries only |
          | 📋 **config-${VERSION}-${SHA}** | Configuration files only |
          | 🚀 **deploy-scripts-${VERSION}-${SHA}** | Deployment scripts only |
          | 📝 **build-metadata-${VERSION}-${SHA}** | Build manifest and SHA256 checksums |

          ## Verification Status
          - Build: ${{ needs.build.result == 'success' && '✅ Passed' || '❌ Failed' }}
          - Integrity Check: ${{ needs.verify.result == 'success' && '✅ Passed' || '❌ Failed' }}

          ## Artifact Retention
          Artifacts will be available for **${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }} days**.

          ---
          > ⚠️ **Security Note**: All artifacts have been scanned for secrets and verified with SHA256 checksums.
          EOF
